upper.title: Modifying comparatives
upper.content:
📌 Modifying Comparatives – Các từ bổ nghĩa cho so sánh hơn
Khi muốn nhấn mạnh hoặc giảm nhẹ mức độ của so sánh hơn (comparative adjectives/adverbs), ta dùng các từ bổ nghĩa (modifiers) đứng trước so sánh hơn.

1. Các từ tăng mức độ (Strengthening modifiers):
• much / far / a lot / a great deal = hơn nhiều
The new version is much better than the old one.
She drives far more carefully than her brother.
This book is a lot more interesting than that one.
• even / still = thậm chí còn hơn
He is tall, but his brother is even taller.
The first exam was hard, but the second was still more difficult.
• considerably / significantly / substantially = đáng kể
The population has grown considerably faster than predicted.
This method is significantly more effective.

2. Các từ giảm mức độ (Weakening modifiers):
• slightly / a bit / a little / somewhat = hơn một chút
I feel slightly better today than yesterday.
Could you speak a bit more slowly?
The weather is a little warmer than last week.
Her explanation was somewhat more complex than I expected.
• not much / not any = không hơn bao nhiêu
The new model is not much different from the previous one.
He is not any taller than his younger sister.

3. Các cấu trúc đặc biệt:
• no + comparative + than = không hơn gì
Her apartment is no bigger than a shoebox.
• any + comparative (thường dùng trong câu hỏi, phủ định)
Is this coat any warmer than that one?
• three times / twice / half as … as
This laptop costs twice as much as that one.
He earns three times more than me.

4. Lưu ý:
• Không dùng very trước so sánh hơn (NOT: very better)
• very much có thể dùng trước so sánh hơn: very much better
• Các từ như rather, fairly, pretty, quite thường dùng với so sánh hơn:
This is rather more expensive than I expected.
⚡ Bảng tóm tắt các modifiers
LoạiTừ bổ nghĩaVí dụ
Tăng mạnhmuch, far, a lot, considerablymuch cheaper, far more expensive
Tăng cựceven, stilleven better, still more difficult
Giảm nhẹslightly, a bit, a little, somewhatslightly warmer, a bit more expensive
Phủ địnhnot much, not any, nonot any better, no bigger than
So sánh số lầntwice, three times, halftwice as expensive, half as much

exercises.q: The weather today is ___ worse than yesterday. It's unbelievable!
exercises.exp: far + comparative = nhấn mạnh mức độ chênh lệch lớn

exercises.q: This restaurant is ___ more expensive than the one we went to last week.
exercises.exp: much đứng trước comparative để nhấn mạnh

exercises.q: Could you speak ___ more slowly? I can't follow you.
exercises.exp: a little + comparative = giảm nhẹ mức độ, chỉ một chút

exercises.q: He's tall, but his brother is ___ taller.
exercises.exp: even + comparative = thậm chí còn hơn nữa

exercises.q: My new job is ___ better than my previous one. I'm much happier.
exercises.exp: far better = tốt hơn nhiều

exercises.q: The new model is ___ different from the old one. They look almost identical.
exercises.exp: not much + comparative = không khác nhiều lắm

exercises.q: The first exam was hard, but the second was ___ more challenging.
exercises.exp: still + comparative = thậm chí còn hơn nữa

exercises.q: She speaks English ___ more fluently than she did last year.
exercises.exp: a lot + comparative = hơn nhiều

exercises.q: This book is ___ interesting than that one, but not by much.
exercises.exp: slightly + more + adj = hơn một chút

exercises.q: The population has grown ___ faster than experts predicted.
exercises.exp: considerably + comparative = hơn đáng kể

exercises.q: Is this coat ___ warmer than that one? I can't decide.
exercises.exp: any + comparative trong câu hỏi = có hơn chút nào không

exercises.q: Her apartment is ___ bigger than a shoebox. It's tiny!
exercises.exp: no + comparative + than = không hơn gì (nhấn mạnh sự tương đương)

exercises.q: This laptop costs ___ as much as that one — exactly double.
exercises.exp: twice as + adj + as = gấp đôi

exercises.q: The weather is ___ warmer than last week, but still quite cold.
exercises.exp: slightly warmer = ấm hơn một chút

exercises.q: He earns ___ more than I do. It's really unfair.
exercises.exp: far more = nhiều hơn nhiều

exercises.q: I'm feeling ___ better than yesterday, but I'm still not 100%.
exercises.exp: a bit better = khá hơn một chút

exercises.q: This method is ___ more effective than the traditional approach.
exercises.exp: significantly + comparative = hơn đáng kể

exercises.q: He drives ___ more carefully than his brother, who is quite reckless.
exercises.exp: far + more + trạng từ + than = hơn nhiều

exercises.q: The new version is only ___ more expensive, so I'll buy it.
exercises.exp: slightly more expensive = đắt hơn một chút

exercises.q: She is ___ more experienced than the other candidates for this position.
exercises.exp: a lot more experienced = có kinh nghiệm hơn nhiều

exercises.q: The hotel was ___ (considerable) more expensive than we had expected.
exercises.exp: considerably + comparative = đắt hơn đáng kể

exercises.q: Could you drive ___ (slight) faster? We're going to be late.
exercises.exp: slightly + comparative = nhanh hơn một chút

exercises.q: His explanation was ___ (far) more confusing than helpful. (Use the modifier only)
exercises.exp: far more = hơn nhiều

exercises.q: The second task was ___ (even) harder than the first one. I almost gave up.
exercises.exp: even + comparative = thậm chí còn khó hơn

exercises.q: The new treatment is ___ (significant) more effective than the old one.
exercises.exp: significantly + comparative = hiệu quả hơn đáng kể

exercises.q: She is ___ (not/much) taller than her younger sister — just a centimetre or two.
exercises.exp: not much + comparative = không cao hơn bao nhiêu

exercises.q: My salary is ___ (three times) lower than what I earned in my previous job.
exercises.exp: cụm từ chỉ số lần + comparative

exercises.q: This bag costs ___ (half) as much as that designer one.
exercises.exp: half as much = một nửa giá

exercises.q: This year's profits are ___ (substantial) higher than last year's.
exercises.exp: substantially + comparative = cao hơn đáng kể

exercises.q: He is ___ (no) better at maths than his sister — they're equally good.
exercises.exp: no + comparative + than = không giỏi hơn gì

exercises.q: The traffic is ___ (a little) worse than usual this morning due to the accident.
exercises.exp: a little + comparative = tệ hơn một chút

exercises.q: The exam was ___ (a lot) more difficult than I had anticipated.
exercises.exp: a lot + more + adj = khó hơn nhiều

exercises.q: This smartphone is ___ (much) better than my old one in every way.
exercises.exp: much + comparative = tốt hơn nhiều

exercises.q: She performed ___ (considerable) better in the second round of interviews.
exercises.exp: considerably better = tốt hơn đáng kể

exercises.q: I'm feeling ___ (a bit) more confident about the exam now that I've studied more.
exercises.exp: a bit more confident = tự tin hơn một chút

exercises.q: The company's new policy is ___ (somewhat) stricter than the previous one.
exercises.exp: somewhat + comparative = nghiêm ngặt hơn phần nào

exercises.q: The price of petrol is ___ (far) higher now than it was five years ago.
exercises.exp: far higher = cao hơn nhiều

exercises.q: My new office is ___ (not/any) bigger than my old one — they're the same size.
exercises.exp: not any + comparative = không lớn hơn chút nào

exercises.q: The situation became ___ (still) more complicated when she arrived late.
exercises.exp: still more complicated = thậm chí còn phức tạp hơn

exercises.q: He ran ___ (twice) as fast as he did in the previous race, setting a new record.
exercises.exp: twice as fast = nhanh gấp đôi

reorder.words: the weather today is far worse than it was yesterday
could you speak a little more slowly I can't follow
he is tall but his brother is even taller than him
the new model is not much different from the old one
this method is significantly more effective than the old one
she speaks English a lot more fluently now than before
the first exam was hard but the second was still harder
this laptop costs twice as much as that one does
her apartment is no bigger than a shoebox
the hotel was considerably more expensive than expected
I am feeling a bit better than yesterday thank you
is this coat any warmer than that one
the new treatment is substantially more effective now
the price of petrol is far higher than five years ago
he earns three times more than I do each month
the situation became still more complicated after that
my new job is a lot better than my previous one
the population has grown considerably faster than predicted
this is rather more expensive than I expected
the second task was even harder than the first

passage.text: When we moved to our new house, the experience was {{1}} more stressful than we had anticipated. The removal company was {{2}} more expensive than the one we used before, costing us nearly twice as much. The new neighbourhood is {{3}} quieter than our old one, which is {{4}} better for our sleep. However, the commute to work is {{5}} longer — it takes {{6}} as long as it used to. Our new house is {{7}} bigger than the old one, but not by much. The kitchen is {{8}} more modern, which we love. The garden is {{9}} no bigger than a postage stamp, which is disappointing. {{10}} more frustrating is the fact that the internet connection here is {{11}} slower than what we had before. My wife says we should be patient, but I find it {{12}} more difficult to adjust than I thought I would.

Comparing my two children is {{1}} more complicated than I ever imagined. My daughter is {{2}} taller than her brother, even though she's two years younger. She is {{3}} more outgoing and confident, while he is {{4}} more reserved. In school, she performs {{5}} better in languages, but he is {{6}} stronger at mathematics. Their interests couldn't be {{7}} more different — she loves sports while he prefers reading. I try {{8}} no harder with one than the other, but they require very different parenting approaches. The younger one is {{9}} more sensitive, so we have to be {{10}} more careful with criticism. Parenting books claim it's {{11}} no easier with the second child, and I can confirm that's {{12}} absolutely true. Each child is unique in their own way.

The company's financial performance this year was {{1}} better than expected, but {{2}} worse than our main competitor. Our revenue grew {{3}} faster than last year, increasing by 15%. However, our costs rose {{4}} more sharply due to inflation, which was {{5}} more problematic. The new marketing strategy proved {{6}} more effective, {{7}} more so than the previous approach. We are now {{8}} twice as profitable as we were three years ago, which is {{9}} more encouraging. However, the global economic situation is {{10}} more unpredictable than ever. Our CEO believes we need to work {{11}} harder to maintain our competitive edge, and I {{12}} entirely agree with that assessment.

Learning to play the piano has been {{1}} more challenging than I expected. After six months, I can play {{2}} better than when I started, but I'm {{3}} no Mozart. My teacher is {{4}} more patient than any teacher I've had before, which helps {{5}} a lot. The pieces I'm learning now are {{6}} more complex than the simple songs I started with. Some days I feel I'm making {{7}} no progress at all, but then I listen to recordings from months ago and realise I've improved {{8}} more than I thought. Practising for {{9}} twice as long each day has made {{10}} a big difference. My fingers are {{11}} more flexible now, though they still get {{12}} sore if I play for too long.

The summer heatwave this year was {{1}} more intense than last year's. Temperatures were {{2}} higher than the seasonal average, {{3}} more so in urban areas. The previous record was {{4}} no match for this year's extreme conditions. Coastal regions were {{5}} cooler, but {{6}} not by much. People consumed {{7}} twice as much water as they normally do during summer months. The demand for air conditioning was {{8}} greater than the supply could meet. Elderly people found the heat {{9}} even more unbearable than younger people did. Scientists say the situation is becoming {{10}} progressively worse each year and will likely get {{11}} still more severe in the coming decades. We all need to take this {{12}} much more seriously than we currently do.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh hai thành phố bạn đã sống hoặc đã đến thăm. Sử dụng các modifiers để làm rõ mức độ khác biệt như far, much, slightly, a lot, even.
writing_prompts.example: I have lived in both Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City, and they are far more different than people realise. Hanoi is much older and has a lot more historical sites. However, Ho Chi Minh City is significantly more modern and fast-paced. The traffic in Saigon is even worse than in Hanoi, but the weather in the North is considerably cooler.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh công việc hiện tại của bạn với công việc trước đây. Dùng các từ bổ nghĩa cho so sánh hơn.
writing_prompts.example: My current job is far more rewarding than my previous one. The salary is considerably higher, and the working hours are a lot more flexible. However, the work is also much more demanding. The projects are even more complex, which makes the job far more interesting. The team I work with now is significantly more supportive.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh cách học tập truyền thống và học online. Dùng các modifiers phù hợp.
writing_prompts.example: Online learning is far more convenient than traditional classroom learning. It is much cheaper and a lot more flexible with scheduling. However, traditional classes are slightly more interactive and provide considerably more face-to-face interaction. For some subjects, studying in person is even more effective because you can ask questions immediately. Both methods have their advantages.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh hai sản phẩm công nghệ (điện thoại, laptop, v.v.) mà bạn biết. Dùng các modifiers.
writing_prompts.example: The latest iPhone is far more expensive than most Android phones, but it is also considerably more user-friendly. Its camera is significantly better, especially in low light conditions. However, Android phones have much larger screens and are a lot more customisable. The battery life on this new model is even longer than the previous version. Some Android phones are even more durable than iPhones.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh cuộc sống trước và sau khi có Internet. Mô tả sự thay đổi dùng các từ bổ nghĩa.
writing_prompts.example: Life before the Internet was far more simple but considerably less convenient. Communication was much slower and a lot more difficult. Now we are far more connected than ever before. Accessing information is significantly easier and a lot faster. However, our privacy is much less protected now, and people spend even more time on screens. The world has become far more globalised but also slightly more impersonal.

upper.title: Compound adjectives in English
upper.content:
📌 Compound Adjectives – Tính từ ghép trong tiếng Anh
Tính từ ghép là tính từ được tạo thành từ hai hoặc nhiều từ kết hợp với nhau, thường có dấu gạch nối (hyphen) giữa các từ.

Các dạng phổ biến:

1. Number + Noun (số + danh từ, danh từ luôn ở dạng số ít):
a ten-minute walk (không phải ten-minutes)
a five-year-old child
a two-hour movie
a three-storey building

2. Adjective + Noun (tính từ + danh từ):
a full-length mirror
a last-minute decision
high-quality products
fast-food restaurants
a long-term plan
a short-term solution
a first-class ticket
part-time work

3. Adjective + Past Participle (tính từ + quá khứ phân từ):
old-fashioned clothes
a well-known author
ready-made meals
low-paid workers
high-speed trains
new-born babies
deep-fried chicken
home-made bread

4. Past Participle + Noun/Noun + Past Participle:
heart-broken lovers
sun-dried tomatoes
hand-made crafts
wind-powered generators
snow-covered mountains

5. Noun + Present Participle (danh từ + hiện tại phân từ):
a time-saving device
life-changing experiences
record-breaking temperatures
mouth-watering food
a thought-provoking book
heart-warming stories
energy-saving bulbs

6. Noun + Adjective (danh từ + tính từ):
duty-free goods
fat-free yogurt
sugar-free drinks
user-friendly software
child-friendly activities
environmentally-friendly products
world-famous landmarks

7. Adjective + Present Participle (tính từ + hiện tại phân từ):
good-looking people
hard-working employees
nice-looking furniture
long-lasting batteries
fast-growing companies

Lưu ý:
• Khi tính từ ghép đứng trước danh từ, nó thường có dấu gạch nối: a well-known actor
• Khi đứng sau động từ to be, có thể có hoặc không có dấu gạch nối: The actor is well known.
• Danh từ trong tính từ ghép số + noun luôn ở dạng số ít: a ten-mile walk (NOT ten-miles walk)

exercises.q: We stayed in a ___ hotel that was really beautiful.
exercises.exp: Số + danh từ (số ít): five-star hotel

exercises.q: She bought a ___ dress for the wedding ceremony.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + danh từ: full-length dress

exercises.q: My grandmother still uses her ___ sewing machine that works perfectly.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + quá khứ phân từ: old-fashioned

exercises.q: They climbed the ___ mountain path with great difficulty.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + quá khứ phân từ: snow-covered

exercises.q: The restaurant served ___ bread that was absolutely delicious.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + quá khứ phân từ: home-made bread

exercises.q: It was a ___ decision that changed everything for the better.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + hiện tại phân từ: life-changing

exercises.q: She needs to buy ___ shoes for running every morning.
exercises.exp: comfortable shoes (không phải tính từ ghép)

exercises.q: The ___ singer gave an incredible performance last night.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + tính từ: world-famous

exercises.q: He bought a ___ ticket so he could relax during the flight.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + danh từ: first-class ticket

exercises.q: We need a ___ solution to this ongoing crisis at work.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + danh từ: short-term solution

exercises.q: Following a ___ diet with plenty of fruits and vegetables is recommended.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + danh từ: low-fat diet

exercises.q: The museum displayed ___ pottery from ancient civilisations.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + quá khứ phân từ: hand-made pottery

exercises.q: They installed ___ light bulbs to save electricity in the office.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + hiện tại phân từ: energy-saving bulbs

exercises.q: The children were fascinated by the ___ display at the science museum.
exercises.exp: interactive là tính từ thường, không phải tính từ ghép

exercises.q: The ___ story moved everyone in the audience to tears.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + hiện tại phân từ: heart-warming story

exercises.q: I prefer ___ vegetables rather than canned ones.
exercises.exp: fresh là tính từ thường

exercises.q: The company is looking for ___ employees who can handle multiple tasks.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + hiện tại phân từ: hard-working employees

exercises.q: She enjoys reading ___ novels that make you think deeply about life.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + hiện tại phân từ: thought-provoking novels

exercises.q: The software is very ___ and easy for beginners to use.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + tính từ: user-friendly software

exercises.q: After a ___ journey, we finally reached our destination.
exercises.exp: Số + danh từ (số ít): ten-hour journey

exercises.q: We went for a ___ (five-mile) walk through the beautiful countryside.
exercises.exp: Số + danh từ (số ít): five-mile walk

exercises.q: She wore a ___ (long-sleeve) shirt to protect herself from the sun.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + danh từ + ed: long-sleeved shirt

exercises.q: The ___ (well-know) author signed copies of her new book for fans.
exercises.exp: Trạng từ + quá khứ phân từ: well-known author

exercises.q: We bought some ___ (hand-make) souvenirs from the local market.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + quá khứ phân từ: hand-made souvenirs

exercises.q: The ___ (hard-work) student finally passed all her exams.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + hiện tại phân từ: hard-working student

exercises.q: It's a ___ (four-hour) flight from London to Cairo.
exercises.exp: Số + danh từ (số ít): four-hour flight

exercises.q: My grandfather tells ___ (heart-warm) stories about his childhood.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + hiện tại phân từ: heart-warming stories

exercises.q: The company offers ___ (high-quality) products at affordable prices.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + danh từ: high-quality products

exercises.q: She bought a ___ (new-born) baby gift for her sister's child.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + quá khứ phân từ: new-born baby

exercises.q: The ___ (mouth-water) aroma of freshly baked bread filled the kitchen.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + hiện tại phân từ: mouth-watering aroma

exercises.q: He has a ___ (part-time) job at a local bookstore.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + danh từ: part-time job

exercises.q: The ___ (fast-grow) tech startup has already expanded to 20 countries.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + hiện tại phân từ: fast-growing startup

exercises.q: She prefers drinking ___ (sugar-free) soft drinks to stay healthy.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + tính từ: sugar-free drinks

exercises.q: The police found ___ (blood-stain) clothes near the crime scene.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + quá khứ phân từ: blood-stained clothes

exercises.q: They went on a ___ (last-minute) trip to the beach when the weather improved.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + danh từ: last-minute trip

exercises.q: The ___ (sun-dry) tomatoes give the pasta a rich flavour.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + quá khứ phân từ: sun-dried tomatoes

exercises.q: We need to develop a ___ (long-term) strategy for sustainable growth.
exercises.exp: Tính từ + danh từ: long-term strategy

exercises.q: The ___ (record-break) heatwave caused temperatures to soar above 40 degrees.
exercises.exp: Danh từ + hiện tại phân từ: record-breaking heatwave

exercises.q: They stayed at a ___ (five-star) resort with amazing ocean views.
exercises.exp: Số + danh từ (số ít): five-star resort

exercises.q: The ___ (environmentally-friendly) packaging is made from recycled materials.
exercises.exp: Trạng từ + tính từ: environmentally-friendly packaging

reorder.words: we stayed in a five-star hotel during our holiday
she bought a full-length dress for the wedding ceremony
the well-known author signed copies of his book
the restaurant served home-made bread with olive oil
they climbed the snow-covered mountain in winter
he gave a life-changing speech that inspired everyone
the hard-working student finally passed all his exams
the world-famous singer performed at the concert hall
we need a long-term strategy for business growth
the heart-warming story moved everyone to tears
she bought a last-minute ticket to the concert
the user-friendly software is easy for beginners
the fast-growing company expanded to twenty countries
he prefers drinking sugar-free soft drinks
the new-born baby weighed three kilograms
the thought-provoking novel made us think deeply
she wore a long-sleeved shirt for sun protection
they bought energy-saving bulbs for their house
the mouth-watering food smelled absolutely delicious
the record-breaking heatwave lasted for two weeks

passage.text: My grandmother's house is full of {{1}} pieces that tell stories of the past. The kitchen always smells of {{2}} bread that she bakes every morning. She still uses her {{3}} sewing machine that has been in the family for decades. In the living room, there is a {{4}} mirror that reaches from floor to ceiling. Her garden is filled with {{5}} flowers that bloom in every colour. She makes {{6}} jam from the fruits she grows herself. My grandmother is a {{7}} woman who worked as a teacher for forty years. She has a wonderful way of telling {{8}} stories about her childhood. Last week, she gave me a {{9}} gift that she had knitted herself. It was a beautiful {{10}} scarf that I will treasure forever. I hope to inherit her {{11}} approach to life and her ability to find joy in simple things.

Our company recently moved to a {{1}} building in the city centre. The offices are modern and {{2}}. We have a {{3}} team that works {{4}} on various projects. The CEO gave a {{5}} speech about our future direction. She is a {{6}} figure in the technology industry and a {{7}} leader who inspires everyone. We are developing {{8}} software solutions for our clients. The company has a {{9}} plan for sustainable growth. We offer {{10}} training programmes for new employees. There is also a {{11}} policy that allows employees to work from home twice a week. The salary is competitive and we receive {{12}} benefits including health insurance.

The _______ (1) heatwave this summer caused serious problems across the country. Temperatures reached ______ (2) highs that broke all previous records. Many ______ (3) citizens, especially the elderly, suffered from heatstroke. The government provided _______ (4) shelters where people could cool down. _______ (5) volunteers distributed free water to those in need. _______ (6) energy consumption reached an all-time high as people used air conditioning around the clock. Firefighters battled _______ (7) wildfires that destroyed thousands of hectares of forest. _______ (8) farmers lost their crops due to the extreme drought conditions. The _______ (9) effects of climate change are becoming impossible to ignore. Scientists urge governments to implement _______ (10) solutions before it's too late.

The _______ (1) startup has revolutionised the way people shop online. Their _______ (2) platform makes it easy for customers to find what they need. The CEO, a _______ (3) entrepreneur, started the company in her garage. She is known for her _______ (4) approach to business challenges. The company's _______ (5) growth has attracted attention from major investors. Last year, they launched a _______ (6) payment system that has been widely adopted. Their _______ (7) delivery service ensures packages arrive within 24 hours. They also offer _______ (8) returns for unsatisfied customers. The _______ (9) working environment attracts top talent from around the world. Industry experts predict _______ (10) success for this innovative company.

The _______ (1) athlete trained for months before the Olympic Games. Her _______ (2) routine included swimming, running and weightlifting. She followed a _______ (3) diet with plenty of protein and vegetables. Her _______ (4) coach pushed her to achieve her personal best. The _______ (5) competition attracted media from around the world. She wore a _______ (6) swimsuit designed specifically for speed. The _______ (7) race lasted only 58 seconds but felt like an eternity. When she won, it was a _______ (8) moment that she will never forget. The _______ (9) crowd cheered as she received her gold medal. Her _______ (10) achievement inspired a new generation of athletes.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả căn nhà mơ ước của bạn. Sử dụng ít nhất 5 tính từ ghép khác nhau.
writing_prompts.example: My dream house would be a well-designed villa with sun-filled rooms. I would want a state-of-the-art kitchen with energy-saving appliances. The garden would have a home-made wooden swing and a hand-built barbecue area. The interior would feature user-friendly smart home technology. A full-length mirror in the hallway and old-fashioned wooden furniture would complete the look.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một người bạn hoặc người thân sử dụng tính từ ghép. Nói về tính cách, ngoại hình và thói quen.
writing_prompts.example: My best friend is a hard-working and kind-hearted person. She is always well-dressed and has a good-looking smile that lights up the room. She is very open-minded and always listens to different perspectives. When there's a crisis, she stays level-headed and finds practical solutions. Her down-to-earth attitude makes everyone feel comfortable around her.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một chuyến du lịch gần đây. Sử dụng tính từ ghép để mô tả phương tiện, khách sạn, đồ ăn và trải nghiệm.
writing_prompts.example: Last summer I took a first-class flight to a sun-drenched island in Thailand. The hotel was a beautifully renovated building with well-preserved traditional architecture. Every morning we ate mouth-watering, home-made pancakes with fresh tropical fruit. The breathtaking sunset views from our balcony were unforgettable. We took a day trip on a high-speed boat to explore nearby islands.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một sản phẩm công nghệ bạn yêu thích. Dùng tính từ ghép để nói về tính năng, thiết kế và hiệu suất.
writing_prompts.example: My new laptop is a state-of-the-art device with a high-resolution display. It has a long-lasting battery that can work for twelve hours on a single charge. The fast-charging feature gives me 50% battery in just 30 minutes. The keyboard is well-designed with backlit keys and a user-friendly layout. It also has a lightweight, slim body that makes it easy to carry everywhere.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một cuốn sách hoặc bộ phim bạn yêu thích. Dùng tính từ ghép để mô tả nội dung, nhân vật và cảm xúc.
writing_prompts.example: The movie I watched last week was a thought-provoking and heart-warming film about family. The story was fast-paced and kept me on the edge of my seat. The well-written script had many life-changing messages about forgiveness. The award-winning actor delivered a mind-blowing performance. The not-to-be-missed ending brought tears to everyone's eyes.

upper.title: Inversion with negative adverbials
upper.content:
📌 Inversion với Negative Adverbials
Khi các trạng từ mang nghĩa phủ định hoặc hạn chế được đặt ở đầu câu để nhấn mạnh, chúng ta phải đảo ngữ (inversion) — đưa trợ động từ lên trước chủ ngữ.

Công thức:
Negative adverbial + auxiliary verb + subject + main verb

1. Các trạng từ phủ định thông dụng:

• Never (before) = Chưa bao giờ
Never have I seen such a beautiful sunset. (Tôi chưa từng thấy hoàng hôn đẹp như vậy)

• Rarely / Seldom = Hiếm khi
Rarely do we get such perfect weather. (Hiếm khi chúng ta có thời tiết hoàn hảo như vậy)

• Little = Hầu như không / không hề
Little did she know that her life was about to change. (Cô ấy không hề biết cuộc đời mình sắp thay đổi)

• Nowhere = Không nơi nào
Nowhere else can you find such quality. (Không nơi nào khác bạn tìm thấy chất lượng như vậy)

2. Các cụm từ với Not / No:

• Not only … but also = Không chỉ … mà còn
Not only did she win the race, but she also broke the record.

• Not until = Mãi cho đến khi
Not until I read the letter did I understand the truth.

• No sooner … than = Vừa mới … thì
No sooner had I sat down than the phone rang.

• Under no circumstances / In no way / On no account / At no time
Under no circumstances should you open this door.
On no account must you touch that equipment.

• Not a single / Not a word
Not a single mistake did she make in the exam.

3. Các cụm với Hardly / Scarcely / Barely:

• Hardly / Scarcely / Barely … when / before = Vừa mới … thì
Hardly had I closed my eyes when the baby started crying.

4. Các cụm với Only:

• Only after / only when / only then / only if / only by
Only by working hard can you achieve your goals.
Only when I arrived did I realise my mistake.

5. So / Such (cấu trúc so … that / such … that):

• So + adj/adv + auxiliary + subject + that …
So exhausted was she that she fell asleep immediately.
• Such + be + noun + that …
Such was the demand that the store sold out in minutes.

Lưu ý:
• Inversion chỉ xảy ra khi những từ này ở đầu câu. Nếu chúng ở vị trí bình thường trong câu, không cần đảo ngữ: I have never seen such beauty. (không đảo)
• Trong văn nói thông thường, ít dùng inversion — nó phổ biến trong văn viết trang trọng và văn học.

exercises.q: ___ have I seen such a breathtaking view in my entire life.
exercises.exp: Never + inversion: Never have I seen

exercises.q: Not until I received her letter ___ I understand how she felt.
exercises.exp: Not until + clause + inversion: did I understand

exercises.q: No sooner had I sat down ___ the phone rang.
exercises.exp: No sooner had … than: vừa ngồi xuống thì điện thoại reo

exercises.q: Under no circumstances ___ you enter that restricted area.
exercises.exp: Under no circumstances + should (modal) + subject

exercises.q: ___ did she realise that she had left her phone at home.
exercises.opts: Only when arriving home,When she arrived home,After arriving home,Arriving home
exercises.exp: Only when + V-ing/at the moment + inversion

exercises.q: ___ had the meeting started when the fire alarm went off.
exercises.exp: Hardly had … when: vừa bắt đầu thì

exercises.q: Not only did she win the competition, but she ___ a scholarship.
exercises.opts: also received,received also,did also receive,also did receive
exercises.exp: Not only … but also: vế sau dùng cấu trúc bình thường

exercises.q: Little ___ that her life was about to change dramatically.
exercises.opts: did she know,she knew,knew she,did know she
exercises.exp: Little did + subject + V (bare infinitive)

exercises.q: ___ on any account should you reveal your password to anyone.
exercises.exp: Not on any account = tuyệt đối không

exercises.q: So exhausted ___ that she fell asleep immediately.
exercises.opts: was she,she was,did she be,had she
exercises.exp: So + adj + inversion: So exhausted was she

exercises.q: Rarely ___ such enthusiasm among young people.
exercises.opts: have I seen,I have seen,seen I have,I seen
exercises.exp: Rarely + inversion: Rarely have I seen

exercises.q: Nowhere else ___ find such fresh produce than at this market.
exercises.opts: can you,you can,do you can,can you to
exercises.exp: Nowhere + inversion: Nowhere else can you find

exercises.q: ___ by working together can we hope to solve this problem.
exercises.exp: Only by + V-ing + inversion: Only by working together can we

exercises.q: At no time ___ aware of the dangers involved in the mission.
exercises.opts: was he,he was,he did be,did he was
exercises.exp: At no time + inversion: At no time was he aware

exercises.q: ___ a word did he speak throughout the entire meeting.
exercises.exp: Not a word + inversion: Not a word did he speak

exercises.q: Seldom ___ such dedicated employees as those in this company.
exercises.opts: do we find,we find,find we,we do find
exercises.exp: Seldom + inversion: Seldom do we find

exercises.q: ___ was the demand that the shop ran out of stock within hours.
exercises.exp: Such + be + noun + that: Such was the demand

exercises.q: Not until the final whistle blew ___ the team celebrate.
exercises.exp: Not until + clause + inversion with past simple: did … celebrate

exercises.q: ___ I known about the risks, I would never have invested.
exercises.exp: Conditional inversion: Had I known = If I had known

exercises.q: In no way ___ responsible for the accident that happened yesterday.
exercises.exp: In no way + inversion: In no way am I responsible

exercises.q: ___ (never) have I tasted such delicious food in my entire life.
exercises.exp: Never + present perfect inversion

exercises.q: Not only ___ she sing beautifully, but she also dances gracefully.
exercises.exp: Not only + auxiliary + subject: Not only does she sing

exercises.q: Hardly ___ (we/arrive) when it started to pour with rain.
exercises.exp: Hardly had + subject + V3 … when

exercises.q: Little ___ (they/know) that their lives were about to change forever.
exercises.exp: Little did + subject + bare infinitive

exercises.q: Only after the results came out ___ (he/believe) he had passed.
exercises.exp: Only after + clause + inversion: did he believe

exercises.q: Under no circumstances ___ (you/should) leave the door unlocked.
exercises.exp: Under no circumstances + should + subject

exercises.q: Nowhere else ___ (you/can) find such high-quality service.
exercises.exp: Nowhere + modal + subject: Nowhere can you

exercises.q: So beautiful ___ (be) the sunset that we stopped to take photos.
exercises.exp: So + adj + be + subject: So beautiful was the sunset

exercises.q: Not until she read the letter ___ (she/understand) everything.
exercises.exp: Not until + clause + inversion in main clause

exercises.q: Rarely ___ (we/see) such dedication from a young employee.
exercises.ans: do we see / have we seen
exercises.exp: Rarely + inversion: Rarely do/have we see/seen

exercises.q: No sooner ___ (the meeting/end) than everyone rushed out.
exercises.exp: No sooner had + subject + V3 … than

exercises.q: At no point during the speech ___ (the speaker/mention) the real problem.
exercises.exp: At no point + inversion in past simple

exercises.q: Only by practising every day ___ (you/can) improve your fluency.
exercises.exp: Only by + V-ing + modal + subject

exercises.q: Seldom ___ (we/have) such a wonderful opportunity as this one.
exercises.ans: do we have / have we had
exercises.exp: Seldom + inversion

exercises.q: Not a single mistake ___ (she/make) in her entire presentation.
exercises.exp: Not a single + noun + inversion

exercises.q: Such ___ (be) the chaos that nobody knew what to do.
exercises.exp: Such + be + noun + that: Such was the chaos

exercises.q: In no way ___ (this/mean) that we are giving up on the project.
exercises.exp: In no way + does + subject + bare infinitive

exercises.q: Not until the war ended ___ (people/can) return to their homes.
exercises.exp: Not until + clause + modal + subject

exercises.q: On no account ___ (visitors/must) feed the animals at the zoo.
exercises.exp: On no account + modal + subject

exercises.q: ___ were the police aware that the suspect had already left the country.
exercises.exp: Little / At no time + inversion: Little were they aware

reorder.words: never have I seen such a beautiful sunset before
not only did she win but she also broke the record
no sooner had I sat down than the phone rang
under no circumstances should you open this door
little did she know her life was about to change
rarely do we get such perfect weather in winter
nowhere else can you find such fresh produce
hardly had I closed my eyes when the baby cried
only by working hard can you achieve your dreams
so exhausted was she that she fell asleep instantly
not until I read the letter did I understand the truth
at no time was he aware of the dangers involved
seldom have I seen such dedication in my career
such was the demand that the shop sold out quickly
only when I arrived did I realise my mistake
not a word did he speak the entire evening
on no account must you touch that equipment
barely had we left when the storm began
only then did she understand what he meant
in no way am I responsible for what happened

passage.text: ___ (1) had I entered the room when I realised something was wrong. ___ (2) did I imagine that I would witness such a dramatic scene. ___ (3) around the office could anyone be seen working — everyone was gathered around the television. ___ (4) did I hear such complete silence in the office before. The CEO stood frozen, and ___ (5) a word did anyone speak. The news was devastating: our biggest competitor had just announced a merger. ___ (6) so uncertain had the future of our company seemed. ___ (7) when the CEO finally spoke did we understand the full picture. ___ (8) by working together as a team could we survive this crisis. ___ (9) had this realisation sunk in when the phone rang with a potential solution. ___ (10) then did I truly appreciate the resilience of our company.

___ (1) have I experienced such an incredible journey as my trip to Antarctica. ___ (2) had the ship left the port when we spotted our first whale. ___ (3) did I realise how vast and beautiful the icy continent truly was. ___ (4) could you find a more pristine environment on Earth. ___ (5) was the silence that it felt almost sacred. ___ (6) on the entire trip did we see any sign of human pollution. ___ (7) then did I understand why people dedicate their lives to preserving such places. ___ (8) when we returned home did I fully appreciate the impact of climate change on these fragile ecosystems. ___ (9) a single piece of ice melted faster than scientists had predicted. ___ (10) by experiencing such places firsthand can we truly understand the urgency of protecting our planet.

When the audition began, ___ (1) had the singer opened her mouth when the judges sat up in their seats. ___ (2) have I heard such a powerful voice in all my years as a judge, one of them said. ___ (3) did anyone expect that a shy nineteen-year-old could perform with such confidence. ___ (4) a wrong note did she hit during her entire performance. ___ (5) was the audience's reaction that people were on their feet within seconds. ___ (6) before had a contestant received a standing ovation before finishing their song. ___ (7) when the performance ended did the audience finally sit down. ___ (8) on the show have we witnessed such raw talent. ___ (9) then did the young singer break into a smile, realising what she had achieved. ___ (10) by taking such a risk could she have created this magical moment.

___ (1) did I know when I started my small business that it would grow into an international company. ___ (2) had I opened my first shop when customers started lining up outside. ___ (3) before had I worked so hard in my entire life, but it was worth it. ___ (4) else could you find such dedicated employees as the ones I had. ___ (5) was the demand for our products that we had to expand three times in two years. ___ (6) once did I consider giving up, even during the toughest times. ___ (7) when I look back now do I fully appreciate the journey. ___ (8) by taking calculated risks and believing in my vision did I succeed. ___ (9) a single business decision did I make without careful consideration. ___ (10) then did I realise that the greatest investment is in people, not just products.

___ (1) had the hiking trip begun when we realised how challenging it would be. ___ (2) have I walked such a difficult trail in all my years of hiking. ___ (3) did anyone tell us that the path was closed due to landslides. ___ (4) around the mountain could we find a safe place to rest. ___ (5) exhausted were we after six hours that we couldn't speak. ___ (6) when a rescue team found us did we feel safe again. ___ (7) before had I been so close to giving up. ___ (8) a single moment did any of us complain, surprisingly. ___ (9) then did I understand the importance of proper preparation. ___ (10) by being properly equipped and informed could we have avoided this dangerous situation.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ khi đi du lịch. Sử dụng ít nhất 3 cấu trúc đảo ngữ với các từ như Never, Hardly, Not only, Only khi.
writing_prompts.example: Never have I had such an amazing travel experience as my trip to Japan. No sooner had I arrived in Tokyo than I fell in love with the city. Not only did I try incredible food, but I also visited ancient temples. Only when I climbed Mount Fuji did I realise how beautiful nature can be. Little did I know that this trip would change my perspective on life completely.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một khoảnh khắc bạn vượt qua thử thách lớn. Dùng các cấu trúc đảo ngữ để nhấn mạnh.
writing_prompts.example: Hardly had I started my final year project when I realised how challenging it would be. Never before had I faced such a complex task. So difficult was the research that I almost gave up. Only by working late nights and weekends did I manage to finish on time. Not until the project was submitted did I finally breathe a sigh of relief.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một buổi hòa nhạc hoặc sự kiện bạn đã tham dự. Dùng đảo ngữ để mô tả cảm xúc và không khí.
writing_prompts.example: Never have I witnessed such an electrifying concert atmosphere. Rarely have I felt so connected to the music and the crowd. Such was the energy that everyone was dancing and singing along. Not only did the band play all their greatest hits, but they also performed new songs. Only when the lights came up did I realise three hours had passed.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một bài học quan trọng bạn đã học được trong cuộc sống. Dùng các cấu trúc đảo ngữ.
writing_prompts.example: Little did I know that failure would be my greatest teacher. Never before had I realised the value of perseverance. Not until I failed my first important exam did I understand the importance of consistent effort. Only by making mistakes have I truly learned and grown. Hardly had I accepted my failure when new opportunities began to appear. Only then did I understand that success is built on failures.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một ngày hoàn hảo của bạn. Sử dụng đảo ngữ để nhấn mạnh những khoảnh khắc đặc biệt.
writing_prompts.example: Never have I felt so peaceful as I did last Sunday. So beautiful was the morning that I decided to go for a long walk in the park. No sooner had I sat down by the lake than a gentle breeze started blowing. Rarely do I take time to appreciate these simple moments. Only when I disconnected from my phone did I realise how much I was missing. Such was the joy of that day that I promised myself to have more days like this.

upper.title: 50 common Noun + Preposition collocations
upper.content:
📌 Các cụm danh từ + giới từ thông dụng B2
Trong tiếng Anh, nhiều danh từ thường đi kèm với một giới từ nhất định. Học thuộc các cụm này sẽ giúp bạn nói và viết tự nhiên hơn.

1. Danh từ + ABOUT:
• a discussion about — a book about — a question about
• They had a heated discussion about climate change.
• I have a question about the homework assignment.

2. Danh từ + FOR:
• reason for, need for, respect for, demand for, talent for, admiration for, responsibility for
• There is no reason for such behaviour.
• She has a natural talent for playing the piano.
• The demand for renewable energy is increasing.

3. Danh từ + IN:
• interest in, belief in, confidence in, pride in, difficulty in, experience in, success in, growth in
• I have no interest in watching reality TV shows.
• She has great confidence in her team's ability.
• He takes pride in his work.

4. Danh từ + OF:
• advantage of, disadvantage of, fear of, example of, result of, cause of, effect of, lack of, benefit of, importance of, possibility of, awareness of, understanding of
• What is the cause of the problem?
• She has a fear of heights.
• The lack of funding has affected the project.

5. Danh từ + ON:
• effect on, influence on, impact on, information on, research on, restriction on, ban on, comment on, emphasis on
• Social media has a huge impact on young people.
• The government imposed a ban on single-use plastics.
• There is too much emphasis on exam results.

6. Danh từ + TO:
• solution to, answer to, response to, reaction to, attitude to/towards, approach to, damage to, access to, contribution to, threat to, invitation to
• We need to find a solution to this problem.
• Everyone should have access to education.
• Pollution poses a serious threat to marine life.

7. Danh từ + WITH:
• relationship with, connection with, problem with, contact with, patience with, similarity with/to, sympathy with/for
• I have a good relationship with my colleagues.
• She has no patience with rude customers.
• There is a problem with the computer system.

8. Danh từ + BETWEEN:
• difference between, relationship between, connection between, distinction between, link between, comparison between, contrast between
• The difference between these two phones is minimal.
• There is a strong link between diet and health.

Lưu ý:
• Mỗi danh từ có quy tắc kết hợp riêng với giới từ — không có công thức chung
• Học theo cụm (collocations) là cách hiệu quả nhất
• Khi học từ mới, hãy luôn học kèm giới từ đi kèm

exercises.q: There is a growing demand ___ renewable energy sources worldwide.
exercises.exp: demand for = nhu cầu về

exercises.q: She has a natural talent ___ playing musical instruments.
exercises.exp: talent for = tài năng về

exercises.q: The cause ___ the accident is still under investigation.
exercises.exp: cause of = nguyên nhân của

exercises.q: We need to find a solution ___ this ongoing problem.
exercises.exp: solution to = giải pháp cho

exercises.q: Social media has a huge impact ___ young people's mental health.
exercises.exp: impact on = tác động lên

exercises.q: The key ___ success is consistent effort and determination.
exercises.exp: key to = chìa khóa cho sự thành công

exercises.q: Everyone should have access ___ quality education regardless of income.
exercises.exp: access to = tiếp cận với

exercises.q: The government announced a ban ___ single-use plastic bags.
exercises.exp: ban on = lệnh cấm về

exercises.q: There is a strong link ___ smoking and lung cancer.
exercises.exp: link between = mối liên hệ giữa

exercises.q: She takes great pride ___ her work and always does her best.
exercises.exp: pride in = tự hào về

exercises.q: The lack ___ funding has seriously affected the research project.
exercises.exp: lack of = sự thiếu hụt

exercises.q: Climate change poses a serious threat ___ our planet's ecosystems.
exercises.exp: threat to = mối đe dọa cho

exercises.q: His attitude ___ his colleagues has improved significantly.
exercises.exp: attitude towards = thái độ đối với

exercises.q: I have no interest ___ watching sports on television.
exercises.exp: interest in = sự quan tâm đến

exercises.q: The main advantage ___ living in a big city is the variety of job opportunities.
exercises.exp: advantage of = lợi thế của

exercises.q: There has been a significant increase ___ the number of students learning online.
exercises.exp: increase in = sự tăng trong

exercises.q: The difference ___ these two smartphones is barely noticeable.
exercises.exp: difference between = sự khác biệt giữa

exercises.q: I have complete confidence ___ my team's ability to deliver the project.
exercises.exp: confidence in = sự tin tưởng vào

exercises.q: The company made a significant contribution ___ local charities.
exercises.exp: contribution to = sự đóng góp cho

exercises.q: There is no reason ___ such extreme behaviour in a professional environment.
exercises.exp: reason for = lý do cho

exercises.q: The demand ___ renewable energy has increased dramatically in recent years.
exercises.exp: demand for = nhu cầu về

exercises.q: She has a natural talent ___ playing the violin.
exercises.exp: talent for = tài năng về

exercises.q: There is no reason ___ worrying about things you cannot control.
exercises.exp: reason for = lý do cho

exercises.q: We need to find a solution ___ the traffic congestion problem.
exercises.exp: solution to = giải pháp cho vấn đề

exercises.q: The government's ban ___ plastic bags came into effect last month.
exercises.exp: ban on = lệnh cấm về

exercises.q: Regular exercise has a positive effect ___ both physical and mental health.
exercises.exp: effect on = ảnh hưởng đến

exercises.q: Everyone should have equal access ___ education and healthcare.
exercises.exp: access to = tiếp cận với

exercises.q: She takes great pride ___ her cultural heritage and traditions.
exercises.exp: pride in = tự hào về

exercises.q: The project failed due to a lack ___ proper planning and resources.
exercises.exp: lack of = thiếu

exercises.q: Pollution poses a serious threat ___ marine life in our oceans.
exercises.exp: threat to = đe dọa đến

exercises.q: He has a great interest ___ learning languages and has studied five so far.
exercises.exp: interest in = quan tâm đến

exercises.q: There is a strong connection ___ regular exercise and longevity.
exercises.exp: connection between = mối liên hệ giữa

exercises.q: The main advantage ___ living abroad is experiencing a different culture.
exercises.exp: advantage of = lợi thế của

exercises.q: I have complete confidence ___ your ability to succeed in this field.
exercises.exp: confidence in = tin tưởng vào

exercises.q: Her attitude ___ learning has changed since she found a good teacher.
exercises.exp: attitude towards/to = thái độ đối với

exercises.q: The company made a generous contribution ___ the local food bank.
exercises.exp: contribution to = đóng góp cho

exercises.q: The results ___ the experiment confirmed our hypothesis.
exercises.exp: results of = kết quả của

exercises.q: His response ___ my question was not very helpful.
exercises.exp: response to = phản hồi cho

exercises.q: She has a lot of experience ___ customer service and handling complaints.
exercises.exp: experience in/of = kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực

exercises.q: There is a growing awareness ___ the importance of mental health.
exercises.exp: awareness of = nhận thức về

passage.text: The key (1)___ success in any field is a combination of hard work and talent. However, there is often a lack (2)___ equal opportunities for everyone. The main advantage (3)___ modern technology is that it provides access (4)___ information that was previously unavailable. However, there are also concerns about the impact (5)___ social media on young people's mental health. The government should place more emphasis (6)___ education rather than just economic growth. There is a growing demand (7)___ environmentally friendly products. Companies have a responsibility (8)___ creating sustainable solutions. Our attitude (9)___ environmental issues needs to change urgently. The link (10)___ pollution and climate change is now undeniable.

The cause (1)___ most conflicts is a breakdown in communication. There is a growing need (2)___ understanding and tolerance in our diverse society. The government has shown a lack (3)___ interest in addressing this issue. However, there is some evidence of an increase (4)___ public awareness. Our attitude (5)___ cultural differences determines how well we can work together. Schools should place more emphasis (6)___ teaching conflict resolution skills. Young people need to develop a respect (7)___ different perspectives. There is a strong connection (8)___ education and social harmony. The answer (9)___ many of our problems lies in better communication. We all have a responsibility (10)___ creating a more peaceful world.

The lack (1)___ physical activity is a major cause (2)___ health problems in modern society. Many people have little interest (3)___ exercise because of their busy schedules. However, the demand (4)___ fitness programmes has increased recently. Regular exercise has a positive effect (5)___ both physical and mental well-being. The key (6)___ maintaining a healthy lifestyle is consistency. There is a strong link (7)___ diet and overall health. People should have better access (8)___ nutritional information. The government needs to place more emphasis (9)___ preventive healthcare. We all have a responsibility (10)___ taking care of our own health.

The solution (1)___ the traffic problem in big cities is not simple. There has been a significant increase (2)___ the number of cars on the roads. The main advantage (3)___ public transport is that it reduces congestion. However, there is a lack (4)___ investment in infrastructure. The impact (5)___ traffic pollution on public health is concerning. The government should place more emphasis (6)___ promoting cycling and walking. People need to change their attitude (7)___ using public transport. There is a growing awareness (8)___ the need for sustainable transport solutions. The key (9)___ success is making public transport more accessible. Everyone has a responsibility (10)___ reducing their carbon footprint.

My interest (1)___ photography started when I was a teenager. I believe I have a natural talent (2)___ capturing special moments. The key (3)___ taking good photos is patience and practice. I have gained a lot of experience (4)___ portrait photography over the years. There is often a lack (5)___ natural light indoors, which makes photography challenging. However, I have developed a confidence (6)___ my ability to work with artificial lighting. My response (7)___ criticism has improved over time — I now welcome feedback. There is a strong connection (8)___ photography and storytelling. My attitude (9)___ learning new techniques has always been positive. I hope to make a contribution (10)___ the art world through my photography one day.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về tầm quan trọng của giáo dục. Sử dụng các cụm danh từ + giới từ như key to success, access to education, lack of, interest in, impact on.
writing_prompts.example: The key to success in life is a good education. Everyone deserves equal access to quality education regardless of their background. Unfortunately, there is still a lack of resources in many rural schools. Children should develop an interest in learning from an early age. Education has a profound impact on society as a whole. There is a growing demand for skilled workers who can adapt to changing technologies.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về vấn đề ô nhiễm môi trường. Dùng các cụm: cause of, solution to, effect on, threat to, awareness of, ban on.
writing_prompts.example: The main cause of environmental pollution is human activity. We need to find a real solution to the waste management crisis. Plastic pollution has a devastating effect on marine life. Climate change is the greatest threat to our planet's future. There is a growing awareness of the need for sustainable living. Many countries have introduced a ban on single-use plastics.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả công việc mơ ước của bạn. Dùng các cụm: interest in, talent for, experience in, confidence in, responsibility for, respect for.
writing_prompts.example: I have a strong interest in technology and innovation. I believe I have a natural talent for solving complex problems. I want to gain more experience in software development. I have confidence in my ability to learn quickly. I would welcome the responsibility for leading important projects. I have great respect for people who work in the tech industry.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về vấn đề sức khỏe tinh thần. Dùng các cụm: importance of, effect on, awareness of, lack of, need for, attitude towards.
writing_prompts.example: The importance of mental health cannot be overstated. Stress has a negative effect on both our physical and mental well-being. There is now greater awareness of mental health issues than ever before. However, there is still a lack of adequate support services in many areas. There is an urgent need for more mental health professionals in schools. Our attitude towards seeking help needs to change — there is no shame in asking for support.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về mối quan hệ giữa công nghệ và cuộc sống. Dùng các cụm: impact on, advantage of, access to, dependence on, link between, attitude towards.
hint_words: link between screen time and health
writing_prompts.example: Technology has a huge impact on how we communicate with each other. The main advantage of modern technology is instant access to information. However, our dependence on electronic devices is growing at an alarming rate. Scientists have found a strong link between excessive screen time and sleep problems. Our attitude towards technology should be balanced — we need to use it wisely. While we enjoy the benefits, we must also be aware of the potential disadvantages.
